protected_core.task_goal: Complete controller hardening and validate that Main can self-approve safe internal controller waves without pausing for the user.
protected_core.expected_output: Green validation evidence, aligned control docs, and a contract-valid closeout checkpoint with no remaining runnable wave.
protected_core.current_step: Record the controlled flag-on validation closeout and final terminal state.
protected_core.resume_point: No active wave. Reopen only on a fresh exact blocker packet or a new approved-scope controller wave.
hard_constraints: Only controller may emit final ABORT.
Missing evidence fails soft to HOLD or REVIEW, never ABORT.
Do not enable controller flags globally unless explicitly requested.
Do not reopen closed lanes without the required exact blocker packet.
business_invariants: Memphis-only 90 day PoC scope remains frozen.
Instinct8 runtime-hook capability stays additive and default-off unless a controlled validation wave requests it.

compaction.halo_summary: Controlled flag-on validation ran under Main approval authority and closed green. No user-approval-gated or auto-runnable wave remains, so the current terminal state is DONE.
